race.comment: CREATOR OF WORLD (7) nice return on his home track here running second, then struggled on the heavy track with a plugging seventh over 1150m at Randwick Kensington in a Super Maiden. Will go back from the draw and can return to form over the extra ground. PARIAH TIME (3) worked hard early from the outside gate first-up when he gripped on well to finish a narrow second over 1200m at Moruya. Looks up to this stronger contest with race experience on his side. Shapes as the main danger with the key jockey change. CELESTIAL GRACE (12) returns after four months in the paddock. Bumped into some handy types last preparation and can sprint well fresh with Grima's claim. Fitted with the two trials and expected to go close. WRITTEN DOLL (8) resumes. Ran a creditable fourth on debut over 1100m at Hawkesbury last March. Has impressed in his two latest trials and can make a positive return.
